Transparent Pricing

No hidden charges. No meter surprises. Just honest, upfront pricing for every service.

Best for solo explorers & couples

₹400/day
  • Honda Activa / Access 125
  • Helmet included free
  • 24-hour rental period
  • Weekly discounts available
  • Fuel not included

Most Popular

Local Sightseeing Taxi

Full-day taxi for sightseeing tours

₹1500/day
  • AC sedan or SUV
  • Up to 8 hours / 80 km
  • Driver + fuel included
  • All major spots covered
  • Custom route possible

For adventure riders & road trips

₹1200/day
  • Royal Enfield Bullet 350
  • GPS tracker included
  • Helmet included free
  • 24-hr breakdown support
  • Outstation allowed

Taxi Rates

Estimated Taxi Fares from Dharamshala

Contact us for exact rates. Prices depend on vehicle type and season.

RouteDistanceEst. Price
Dharamshala ↔ McLeod Ganj10 km₹300–500
McLeod Ganj ↔ Bhagsu3 km₹200–300
Dharamshala ↔ Kangra Airport15 km₹600–900
Local sightseeing (full day)Up to 80 km₹1500–2000
Dharamshala ↔ Kangra Fort20 km₹500–700
Dharamshala ↔ Bir Billing70 km₹2000–2500
Dharamshala ↔ Dalhousie115 km₹3500–4500
Dharamshala ↔ Amritsar185 km₹4000–5500
Dharamshala ↔ Manali240 km₹5000–7000
Dharamshala ↔ Shimla220 km₹5000–6500

* Estimates only. Vehicle type, number of stops, and seasonal demand may affect pricing. Get an exact quote on WhatsApp →

What's Included

No Hidden Charges — Ever

✅ Always Included

  • ✓Driver charges
  • ✓Fuel cost (taxi)
  • ✓Helmet with scooty/bike
  • ✓Parking charges (in most cases)
  • ✓Basic trip assistance
  • ✓WhatsApp support

❌ Not Included

  • ×Fuel for scooty/bike rentals
  • ×Toll taxes (on long routes)
  • ×State entry permits (if any)
  • ×Driver accommodation (on overnight trips)
  • ×Entry fees to monuments
  • ×Food & refreshments
